scope: Slice 3 (styles) — real-Word behavior probes via the AppleScript object model (slice-3 plan Task 2), plus live verification of the read-style-props oracle verb on a Word-authored style probe

probes.method: Scratch doc (never saved): set style of paragraph 1 of d to style heading1; read name local of (get style ...); set style ... to style heading1 AGAIN; re-read.
probes.verdict: APPLY semantics — re-applying the active style is a no-op; it does NOT toggle the paragraph back to Normal.

probes.probe: direct-format clearing — ONE bold word (minority coverage)
probes.method: set bold of font object of (words 1 thru 1 of text object of paragraph 2 of d) to true; set style of paragraph 2 of d to style heading1; re-read word-1 bold + a non-bolded word's bold.
probes.verdict: PRESERVED — direct character formatting covering a minority of the paragraph SURVIVES applying a paragraph style.

probes.probe: direct-format clearing — WHOLE paragraph bold (full coverage)
probes.method: set bold of font object of (text object of paragraph 3 of d) to true; set style of paragraph 3 of d to style heading1; re-read paragraph + word-1 bold.
probes.verdict: CLEARED — full-coverage direct bold is absorbed/reset by the style application. Combined with the minority probe: Word clears direct char marks ONLY at full/majority coverage; the PM engine's unconditional char-mark clearing matches Word only for that case and DEVIATES for partial coverage — record as the slice's recorded-deviation (or fix).

probes.probe: style gallery highlight (active style indication in the ribbon gallery)
probes.method: visual-only — no UI scripting (GUI/AX scripting excluded by the oracle contract)

probes.probe: hover preview scope (live preview while hovering a gallery entry)
probes.method: visual-only — no UI scripting (GUI/AX scripting excluded by the oracle contract)

probes.probe: read-style-props verb on the Word-authored style probe (oracle-style-probe.docx)
probes.method: Authored IN real Word: make new document; 4 paragraphs; set style of paragraph 2 to style heading1 (enum token, worked first try); paragraph 3 to style title; make new Word style at d with properties {name local:"MyProbeStyle", style type:style type paragraph} (worked first try); applied to paragraph 4 via plain name STRING; save as ~/Desktop/oracle-style-probe.docx; Word itself re-saved a copy to tests/fixtures/oracle-style-probe.docx (gitignored). Verb run against both paths.
probes.verdict: VERB VERIFIED — style reads must use name local of (get style of paragraph i of d): the GET returns a style OBJECT, not a WdBuiltinStyle enum token (as-string coercion -1700, word-oracle quirk #27); built-ins read as display names, custom styles as their creation name; SET accepts enum token AND name string.

pidSafety: All probes on a scratch document (never saved) closed by name-verified ordinal saving no; the style probe closed by its NEW basename after save as (quirk #11/#21); document count verified 0 after every leg; one relaunch-restored copy of our own slice-2 fixture was closed by exact basename at session start to reach baseline 0; Word never quit.
